# UUP Dump Fixtures

Place local UUP Dump source-prep fixtures here, including:

- UUP Dump package zip files.
- Final ISO outputs produced by UUP Dump.

Do not use converted UUP folders as WinMint inputs. If UUP Dump already produced
an ISO, tests and users should pass that ISO through `-SourceIso`.

These payloads are ignored by git. Do not commit Microsoft payloads or generated
conversion output.
